name: Pineapple Zucchini Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the eggs, brown sugar, granulated sugar, salt, and vanilla extract until well combined.
3. Add the baking soda to the egg mixture and stir until incorporated.
4. Gradually add the flour and crushed pineapple to the egg mixture, alternating with each addition.
5. Mix in the zucchini and raisins (if using) until just combined.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 12 inch pan.
7. Sprinkle the chopped pecans on top of the batter.
8. Bake for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing it and serving.
10. Serve with your choice of icing, if desired.
